The official HRNZ club page confirms Winton Harness Racing Club Inc, generated 2026-05-23, and exposes an All Weather Track Map link, but fetched text still does not name Central Southland Raceway. Keep out of manual calendar until source text naming is captured.

The official HRNZ club page confirms Invercargill Harness Racing Club Inc and exposes track-map links, but fetched text still does not name Ascot Park. Keep out of manual calendar until source text naming is captured.

The official HRNZ club page confirms Forbury Park Trotting Club Inc, generated 2026-02-24, with a Grass Track Map link and Southern Harness Racing contact address, but it does not name the 2026-06-21 racecourse. Forbury Park Raceway closed in 2021, so do not infer the venue.

additional_evidence_checked.result: Official June 2026 HRNZ racing dates page confirms the club-date rows, including Invercargill on 2026-06-01 and 2026-06-11, Forbury Park on 2026-06-21, and Winton on 2026-06-25.
Official Winton club page confirms the club and an All Weather Track Map link, but not an explicit racecourse name in fetched text.
Official Invercargill club page confirms the club and track-map links, but not an explicit racecourse name in fetched text.
Official Forbury Park club page confirms the club and a Grass Track Map link, but not an explicit 2026-06-21 racecourse name.

promotion_blocker.reason: HRNZ June source table labels the venue column as Club, not Racecourse. PR-130 C-rank display requires meeting_date + racecourse. Promote only after club-to-racecourse mapping is source-verified for all rows. Current status: 15 of 18 rows can be mapped with high confidence; Forbury Park Trotting Club Inc remains unresolved and Winton/Invercargill still need explicit racecourse text capture before full promotion.
